positive: A vibrant, symmetrical mandala pattern depicting cosmic flora and fauna. The central composition features stylized celestial elements, including crescent moons, nebulae swirls, and glowing stylized bioluminescent foliage. The color palette is rich jewel tones (deep sapphire, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted with stark white highlights and gold foil accents. Clean, sharp line art outlines against a deep space void background. High contrast, minimalist illustrative style, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Intricate detail, symmetry, graphic quality.
negative: low resolution, blurry, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifact, noisy, fuzzy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, messy, grainy
